features.title: Local Dishes
features.text: Enjoy authentic Nigerian favorites prepared with rich flavors and traditional recipes.

features.title: Fresh Ingredients
features.text: We use carefully selected ingredients inspired to make ensure every dish is fresh, vibrant, and full of flavor.

features.title: Fine Wine List
features.text: A curated selection of wine and beverages thoughtfully paired to complement our Nigerian Cuisine.

features.title: Private Dining
features.text: Enjoy a refined dining experience, perfect for intimate gatherings celebrations, and special occasions.

meals.name: Jollof Rice & Chicken
meals.desc: Smoky party jollof with grilled chicken and fried plantain.

meals.name: Egusi & Pounded Yam
meals.desc: Rich melon seed stew with assorted meat and smooth pounded yam.

meals.name: Suya Platter
meals.desc: Spiced skewered beef with sliced onions, tomatoes and yaji.

soups.name: Pepper Soup
soups.desc: Light, fiery broth with goat meat and aromatic spices.

soups.name: Afang Soup
soups.desc: Afang leaves and waterleaf cooked with assorted seafood.

soups.name: Ofe Onugbu
soups.desc: Bitter leaf soup slow-cooked with oxtail and crayfish.

drinks.name: Zobo Royale
drinks.desc: Chilled hibiscus drink infused with ginger and pineapple.

drinks.name: Chapman
drinks.desc: Classic Nigerian cocktail with Fanta, Sprite and Angostura bitters.

drinks.name: Palm Wine
drinks.desc: Freshly tapped, lightly fermented and naturally sweet.
